name: tsm
description: Transmission BitTorrent client management — add, monitor, organize, and automate torrents via the tsm CLI

interface.shortDescription: Manage Transmission BitTorrent client via RPC
interface.longDescription: Add torrents, monitor downloads, manage trackers, set speed limits, apply seeding policies, and automate torrent workflows through the tsm CLI. Supports magnet links, .torrent files, per-file priority, labels, watch directories, and JSON output for scripting.
defaultPrompt: List my active downloads and show progress
Add this magnet link and set high priority
Clean up torrents seeded above 2.0 ratio
